name: context-forge
description: Set up and maintain the Six-File Context Methodology in any project (any stack) — initialize context files, refine prompts, plan and add features, run the build/verify/debug/PR loop, log architecture decisions, audit for drift, and resume work. Antigravity CLI build: skills auto-discovered from skills/, plus deterministic, token-free hooks that load context, record activity, and guard generated/protected files.
